shipping_and_delivery.title: Shipping & Delivery Policy
shipping_and_delivery.content: We offer standard shipping across India. Orders are dispatched within 1-2 business days after confirmation. Standard delivery takes 3-5 business days depending on your location. Express delivery is available for an extra charge. You will receive a tracking link once your order is dispatched. We do not deliver on Sundays and public holidays.

return_and_refund.title: Return & Refund Policy
return_and_refund.content: We accept returns within 7 days of delivery. The product must be unused, in original condition, and in original packaging. To initiate a return, contact us with your order ID and reason. Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days after we receive the returned item. Damaged or wrong products are eligible for free return pickup. Sale items are not eligible for return.
